## Checklist

- [ ] I added tests, or explained why a test does not apply.
- [ ] I updated documentation for behavior or public-interface changes.
- [ ] I reviewed the diff for secrets, sensitive data, and unrelated changes.
- [ ] Every commit includes a Developer Certificate of Origin sign-off.
